faqScreen.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqScreen.subtitle: Answers to the questions our users ask most.

whyChooseOurService.title: Why Choose Our Service?
whyChooseOurService.answer:
Discover a modern and elegant way to showcase real estate in Syria. Our platform is designed to present every property with clarity, sophistication, and professionalism, ensuring that all details about the property and its owner are easily accessible — no extra explanations needed.

We do not act as intermediaries between buyers and sellers. Our role is simply to provide a trusted, transparent space where listings can be displayed beautifully and efficiently.

Whether you're in Syria or living abroad, our platform makes it easy to browse, explore, and choose your future home from anywhere in the world.

howSecureAreYourServices.title: How Secure Are Your Services?
howSecureAreYourServices.answer: Your security is our top priority. We use advanced technologies to keep your data and account safe, including password encryption with bcrypt, JWT authentication, and protected APIs. Access to features and data is controlled through role-based permissions, and all communications occur over secure HTTPS connections.

customerSupportService.title: Customer Support Service
customerSupportService.answer: We're here for you — anytime, anywhere. Our customer support team is available 24/7, ready to help with any inquiries or issues. You can also reach us through our dedicated complaints email, and we'll respond within 24 hours.

howCanIUpdateMyAccountInformation.title: How Can I Update My Account Information?
howCanIUpdateMyAccountInformation.answer:
Updating your account information is quick, simple, and secure. You can make changes directly through your profile, and no additional approval is required.

If any major updates occur, we'll notify you in advance via in-app notifications and email alerts.

howDoYouCalculateFees.title: How Do You Calculate Fees?
howDoYouCalculateFees.answer: Our platform is completely free for the first six months. If we introduce any fees in the future, we'll give you a full month's notice via email and our communication channels.

howDoIPayMyInvoices.title: How Do I Pay My Invoices?
howDoIPayMyInvoices.answer: You can pay your invoices via bank transfer through Al-Haram or any money transfer center. Once confirmed, points are added to your account. Sertel Cash and MTN Cash are also supported. The process usually takes no more than 3 hours.

areThereAnyHiddenFees.title: Are There Any Hidden Fees?
areThereAnyHiddenFees.answer: No. Everything is transparent and clearly displayed. We do not take any commission between buyers and sellers — we simply provide a platform to showcase properties. If anything changes, all users are notified at least one month in advance.

whatIsTheRefundProcedure.title: What Is The Refund Procedure?
whatIsTheRefundProcedure.answer: This feature will be available soon. Full details on how to request a refund will be provided once it's launched.

isThereFinancialOrAccountingSupport.title: Is There Financial Or Accounting Support?
isThereFinancialOrAccountingSupport.answer: Yes. Our dedicated financial support team is here to help, and your funds and points are always safe and fully protected.

whatLanguagesDoesYourServiceSupport.title: What Languages Does Your Service Support?
whatLanguagesDoesYourServiceSupport.answer: Our service currently supports English and Arabic.

whatAreTheSafetyFeatures.title: What Are The Safety Features?
whatAreTheSafetyFeatures.answer:
Our platform implements comprehensive security protocols:

JWT-based authentication for secure, stateless sessions.

Encrypted password storage using strong hashing algorithms.

Authorized API access requiring valid tokens.

Role-based access control (RBAC) for fine-grained permissions.

HTTPS data transmission for all communications.

Authorization enforcement: users can only access their own resources.

howCanIRequestNewFeatures.title: How Can I Request New Features?
howCanIRequestNewFeatures.answer:
We love hearing from you. Share your ideas in any of these ways:

Call us at the phone number listed on the Contact page.

Email us at the address on the same page.

Fill out the form on our website to send a feature request directly.

isMyDataProtected.title: Is My Data Protected?
isMyDataProtected.answer: Yes. Passwords are securely hashed, communications are encrypted, and only authorized users can access sensitive information. We use multiple layers of security to keep your data private.

havingTechnicalIssues.title: Having Technical Issues?
havingTechnicalIssues.answer: Report it via phone, email, or our website form, and our team will help you get back on track.
